item.title: 'Snoop Dogg performed private gig in our canteen'
item.description: The US rapper performed back to back classics, ahead of attending his first Swansea City game.

item.title: MPs openly criticising Andrew reflects shift in tradition
item.description: In the Commons, MPs shared their personal experiences of meeting the former prince – all of them were resoundingly negative.

item.title: UK temperatures expected to reach 18C after rainy start to 2026
item.description: How high will temperatures reach and how long will stay mild? Darren Bett has the details.

item.title: Mandelson's lawyers say he was arrested over 'baseless' claim he was a flight risk
item.description: The peer's lawyers say there is no truth in the suggestion he was planning to leave the UK.

item.title: Trump to address a changed America at vital moment for his presidency
item.description: Few of Donald Trump’s speeches to Congress have had as much riding on them as the one on Tuesday night.
